name: io.github.genecell/preprint-fulltext
description: Retrieve full text of bioRxiv/medRxiv/arXiv preprints as structured sections to ground scientific reasoning and deep research for coding agents (Europe PMC + openRxiv S3 + arXiv LaTeXML), with search and discovery.

environmentVariables.name: CONTACT_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email for the Europe PMC / OpenAlex polite pools (recommended).

environmentVariables.name: OPENALEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAlex API key (only needed for OpenAlex discover/search; required by OpenAlex since 2026-02-13).
